news.t: Not All Total Bond Market ETFs Are the Same. Here's What to Know.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Aggregate Bond ETF (SPAB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Aggregate index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of the aggregate USD-denominated investment-grade bond market with at least one year to maturity. SPAB was launched on May 23, 2007 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Not All Total Bond Market ETFs Are the Same. Here's What to Know.
data.text: Not understanding the difference between similarly named funds can be costly
